0.q: the apple calli overexpressing MhCLC-c1 exhibited lower hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) content, superoxide anion (O2–) generation rate... but that suppressing MhCLC-c1 had higher H2O2 content, O2– generation rate under NaCl stress

1.q: MV treatment resulted in greater GUS expression in plants carrying either the MhYTP1 or MhYTP2 promoter... roots were generally longer from OE plants than from the WT, indicating that the latter was more sensitive to this stress treatment.

2.q: Overexpressing MdWRKY53 enhanced KCl tolerance in transgenic apple plants by increasing K+ efflux and K+ compartmentalization.

3.q: MdGORK1 localized to the plasma membrane and enhanced K+ efflux to increase KCl tolerance in transgenic apple plants.

4.q: RT–qPCR and LUC activity analyses indicated that MdWRKY53 binds to the promoters of MdGORK1 and MdNHX2 and induces their transcription.
